title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description: Lead frontend architecture and development of high-performance, scalable web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks for our core SaaS platform.
responsibilities: Architect and build complex React-based applications with TypeScript
Collaborate closely with product managers, designers, and backend teams
Drive performance optimizations, accessibility, and SEO improvements
Mentor junior and mid-level engineers on best practices and code reviews
requirements: 5+ years of professional experience with React and TypeScript
Deep knowledge of modern HTML5, CSS3, responsive design, and accessibility (a11y)
Strong experience integrating REST/GraphQL APIs and state management
Proven problem-solving and debugging skills in production environments
niceToHave: Web performance tooling (Lighthouse, Core Web Vitals)
benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance

title: Product Designer
description: Create intuitive, user-centered designs for our cloud-based SaaS tools, focusing on seamless experiences across web and mobile platforms.
responsibilities: Create user flows, wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs in Figma
Partner with product managers and engineers throughout the development cycle
Conduct user research, usability testing, and A/B test analysis
Contribute to and evolve our scalable design system
requirements: Strong portfolio showcasing end-to-end product design work
Advanced proficiency in Figma and prototyping tools
Solid understanding of UX principles, interaction design, and accessibility standards
niceToHave: User research facilitation and analytics tools experience

title: Backend Engineer
description: Design, implement, and maintain robust backend services and APIs powering our global logistics platform with high reliability and scalability.
responsibilities: Develop scalable RESTful/GraphQL APIs and microservices in Node.js/Java/Go
Design efficient data models and optimize database queries/performance
Ensure high availability, security, and fault tolerance
Collaborate with frontend, DevOps, and product teams on feature delivery
requirements: 4+ years professional experience with Node.js, Java, or Go
Strong experience with relational (PostgreSQL) and NoSQL databases (MongoDB)
Understanding of distributed systems, caching, and message queues
benefits: German language courses and team events

title: Engineering Manager
description: Lead and grow a high-performing engineering team building mission-critical SaaS products in a fast-paced, innovative environment.
responsibilities: Manage, mentor, and grow a team of 8-12 engineers across full-stack
Define technical strategy, architecture, and roadmap alignment with business goals
Partner with product, design, and executive leadership on prioritization
Maintain engineering standards, code quality, velocity, and hiring processes
requirements: Proven track record leading engineering teams (5+ direct reports)
Strong technical background in full-stack or backend development
Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and conflict resolution skills

title: Data Scientist
description: Develop predictive models and derive actionable insights from complex datasets to drive AI-powered business decisions and product features.
responsibilities: Analyze and process large-scale structured/unstructured data using Python/SQL
Build, validate, tune, and deploy machine learning models (scikit-learn/PyTorch)
Collaborate with engineering and product teams on model integration and monitoring
Present findings, visualizations, and recommendations to stakeholders
requirements: Strong foundation in statistics, probability, and experimental design
Proficiency in Python (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn) and SQL
Excellent data storytelling, visualization (Matplotlib/Seaborn/Tableau), and communication skills
niceToHave: Background in AI/ML startups or fintech
benefits: Performance bonuses tied to model impact
Private health insurance and pension contribution

title: Junior Frontend Engineer
description: Contribute to building responsive and performant web applications while growing under senior guidance in a supportive team environment.
responsibilities: Implement UI components and features using React/TypeScript
Work closely with senior engineers on code reviews, pair programming, and architecture
Debug and resolve issues across frontend and integration layers
Participate in agile ceremonies, sprint planning, and retrospectives
requirements: 1–2 years professional React experience or strong equivalent projects
Solid HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript fundamentals, and responsive design
Comfortable with Git, basic CI/CD workflows, and pull requests
niceToHave: Exposure to Next.js or modern state management (Zustand/Redux Toolkit)
Basic testing experience (Jest, React Testing Library)
benefits: Structured mentorship and career growth program

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Craft clean, accessible, and delightful user interfaces for our growing product suite in a collaborative remote setting.
responsibilities: Design wireframes, interactive prototypes, and production-ready assets in Figma
Iterate on designs based on user feedback, testing results, and metrics
Collaborate with developers to ensure high-fidelity implementation and handoff
requirements: 2+ years professional experience using Figma at scale
Strong grasp of UI/UX principles, design systems, and WCAG accessibility
niceToHave: SaaS or B2B design portfolio pieces
Motion design or advanced prototyping (Framer, Principle)
benefits: Fully remote and flexible part-time hours

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Build and maintain reliable CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and monitoring for high-traffic services.
responsibilities: Automate deployments, infrastructure provisioning (IaC), and scaling
Monitor system health, performance, logs, and incident response
Improve reliability, security, observability, and cost efficiency
requirements: Hands-on experience with AWS or GCP in production
Strong CI/CD tooling (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins)
Linux administration, scripting (Bash/Python), and container basics
benefits: Flexible working hours and home office options

title: Marketing Manager
description: Develop and execute go-to-market strategies, campaigns, and brand initiatives for our SaaS products in competitive B2B markets.
responsibilities: Lead multi-channel marketing campaigns (content, email, paid, events)
Coordinate cross-functional teams (content, product, sales, design)
Track KPIs, attribution, and optimize for ROI and customer acquisition
requirements: 5+ years in B2B/SaaS marketing with proven campaign results
Strong analytical skills and proficiency in tools like Google Analytics, HubSpot
Leadership experience managing budgets and small teams
niceToHave: Demand generation, ABM, and product-led growth experience

title: QA Engineer
description: Ensure the quality and reliability of AI-driven software through comprehensive manual and automated testing strategies.
responsibilities: Design and execute end-to-end test plans and cases
Automate regression, integration, and API tests
Track, report, verify bugs, and collaborate on fixes
requirements: Experience with automation frameworks (Cypress, Selenium, Playwright, Jest)
Strong attention to detail, analytical mindset, and bug reporting skills
benefits: Potential for extension to permanent role

title: Frontend Intern
description: Support frontend development under guidance of senior engineers while gaining hands-on experience with modern web technologies.
responsibilities: Implement small features and UI components in React
Fix bugs and participate in code reviews
Learn best practices in TypeScript, testing, and performance
requirements: Basic HTML/CSS/JavaScript knowledge and enthusiasm for frontend
Interest in React and modern web development
Currently pursuing or recently completed relevant degree
benefits: Flexible schedule and potential full-time conversion

title: Backend Intern
description: Assist backend engineers in building and maintaining APIs and services while learning production-grade development.
responsibilities: Fix small bugs and implement minor features
Write unit/integration tests
Learn backend frameworks, databases, and deployment
requirements: Interest in Node.js, Java, or similar backend technologies
Basic SQL and API understanding
Enthusiasm for learning in a team setting

title: Content Writer
description: Write engaging, SEO-optimized content for product blogs, website, and marketing campaigns in the SaaS space.
responsibilities: Create blog posts, case studies, and thought leadership articles
Develop social media content and email newsletters
Collaborate with designers and product team for cohesive messaging
requirements: Strong writing and editing skills with portfolio
SEO best practices and keyword research experience
niceToHave: SaaS or tech industry writing experience
Familiarity with tools like Ahrefs or SEMrush
benefits: Fully remote and flexible part-time schedule

title: HR Manager
description: Manage recruitment, employee engagement, and HR programs in a growing tech company.
responsibilities: Lead full-cycle recruitment and talent acquisition
Develop employee engagement initiatives and retention strategies
Manage HR policies, compliance, and performance processes
requirements: 5+ years HR experience, preferably in tech/SaaS
Strong leadership, communication, and organizational skills

title: Mobile App Developer
description: Build high-quality, performant mobile applications for iOS and Android using cross-platform frameworks.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain cross-platform mobile apps (Flutter/React Native)
Test on multiple devices and OS versions
Collaborate with designers and backend teams for API integration
requirements: 3+ years experience with Flutter or React Native
Strong mobile debugging, performance optimization, and deployment skills
niceToHave: App Store and Google Play deployment experience

title: QA Intern
description: Assist QA engineers in testing web applications and learning quality assurance processes.
responsibilities: Write and execute manual test cases
Report and track bugs in Jira
Learn automated testing basics
requirements: Basic understanding of QA principles and software testing
Strong attention to detail and methodical approach

title: Customer Success Manager
description: Ensure customers achieve maximum value with our SaaS products through proactive support and relationship management.
responsibilities: Onboard new clients and create success plans
Provide ongoing support, training, and feature adoption guidance
Collaborate with product and engineering on feedback and improvements
requirements: 3+ years in customer success or account management
Excellent communication, problem-solving, and relationship-building skills

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze datasets, create reports, and provide actionable insights to support business and product decisions.
responsibilities: Data cleaning, transformation, and visualization
Build dashboards and recurring reports
Collaborate with stakeholders to answer business questions
requirements: Strong SQL proficiency and experience with Python/R
Excel/Google Sheets advanced usage and BI tools (Tableau/Power BI)

title: DevOps Intern
description: Assist DevOps engineers with deployment, monitoring, and infrastructure tasks while learning cloud and automation.
responsibilities: Support deployment of small tasks and updates
Monitor systems and alert on issues
Learn CI/CD pipelines and IaC tools
requirements: Basic Linux/command-line knowledge
Interest in DevOps, cloud, and automation

title: HR Intern
description: Support the HR team with recruitment, onboarding, and administrative tasks in a dynamic AI company.
responsibilities: Assist with candidate sourcing and scheduling
Help document processes and maintain records
Support employee onboarding and events
requirements: Interest in HR and people operations
Good communication and organizational skills
